metadata.description: Your Cyber Partner — Memory Storage & Intelligent Push. Provides persistent memory for Claude Code, automatically saving and retrieving key information from conversations.

plugins.name: corivo-save
plugins.description: Save memories to Corivo database. Supports facts, knowledge, decisions, instructions, and other memory block types.

plugins.name: corivo-query
plugins.description: Query memories from Corivo database. Supports full-text search, annotation filtering, vitality-based sorting, and more.
